originalTitle: Summer Game Fest Live 2026: The biggest news, trailers, and announcements
summary: Geoff Keighley’s annual June showcase for videos games has officially happened, and it was a big one. Across a two hour event — and another hour for Day of the Devs — we got news about the third Final Fantasy VII remake game, a new look at Control Resonant, the reveal of Tupac for RGG […]
content: Geoff Keighley’s annual June showcase for videos games has officially happened, and it was a big one. Across a two hour event — and another hour for Day of the Devs — we got news about the third Final Fantasy VII remake game, a new look at Control Resonant, the reveal of Tupac for RGG Studio’s Stranger Than Heaven, a July 1.0 launch date for Palworld, and a whole lot of 2027 release dates as developers steer clear of GTA VI in November. Summer Game Fest Live sits squarely in the middle of a big run of video game showcases. PlayStation hosted a State of Play on Tuesday that featured more footage of September’s Wolverine and the announcement of a new God of War game, God of War Laufey. On Saturday, there are shows like the Wholesome Direct and the Future Games Show, and the Xbox Games Showcase and PC Gaming Show take place on Sunday. Read on for our coverage of the biggest updates from Summer Game Fest Live.
chineseTitle: 2026 年夏季游戏节直播：最大新闻、预告片和公告
chineseSummary: 杰夫·基斯利 (Geoff Keighley) 一年一度的 6 月视频游戏展示会正式举行，这是一场盛大的活动。在两个小时的活动中——以及开发者日的另一个小时——我们得到了有关第三部《最终幻想 VII》重制版游戏的消息，《Control Resonant》的新面貌，以及 RGG 的 Tupac 的揭晓 […]
chineseContent: 杰夫·基斯利 (Geoff Keighley) 一年一度的 6 月视频游戏展示会正式举行，这是一场盛大的活动。在为期两个小时的活动中，以及开发者日的另一个小时中，我们得到了有关第三部《最终幻想 VII》重制版游戏的消息、《Control Resonant》的新面貌、RGG Studio 的《Stranger Than Heaven》中 Tupac 的揭晓、Palworld 的 7 月 1.0 发布日期，以及由于开发者在 11 月避开 GTA VI 的大量 2027 年发布日期。夏季游戏节现场直播正好位于大量视频游戏展示的中间。 PlayStation 于周二举办了 State of Play，其中展示了九月份《金刚狼》的更多镜头，并宣布了一款新的《战神》游戏《战神 Laufey》。周六有 Wholesome Direct 和 Future Games Show 等节目，周日还有 Xbox Games Showcase 和 PC Gaming Show。请继续阅读我们对夏季游戏节直播的最大更新的报道。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
